page: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a fractional GPU instance within the Cloud GPU family, designed to support parallel computing workloads. It is powered by an Intel x86_64 processor configured with 8 shared vCPUs, 8 physical cores, and 1 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 40.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 5.0 GB of RAM per core.

For hardware acceleration, the server features a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU representing a 0.3333 allocation, which delivers 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 740 GB NVMe SSD, and the network configuration includes 1 complimentary public IPv4 address. Because the CPU allocation is shared, users should expect some performance variability compared to dedicated CPU instances.

This resource configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency by allowing users to access the NVIDIA Ampere architecture without the expense of provisioning a full GPU. It serves as a practical option for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not fully saturate a dedicated card. Appropriate workloads include mid-range machine learning inference, data science processing, video transcoding, and database operations.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a fractional GPU instance designed for workloads requiring accelerated compute and fast local storage. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 8 shared Intel vCPUs with 8 physical cores and 1 thread per core, paired with 40.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU providing 16 GB of VRAM, alongside a 740 GB NVMe SSD for high-speed local storage. A single complimentary public IPv4 address is included. By utilizing a shared CPU allocation and a fractional GPU, this instance offers a cost-efficient alternative to full GPU nodes, making it suitable for smaller-scale machine learning inference, data analysis, and GPU-assisted rendering or transcoding tasks.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a Cloud GPU instance featuring 8 shared Intel vCPUs, 40 GB RAM, a 740 GB NVMe SSD, and a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for cost-effective accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is an Intel-based Cloud GPU instance with 8 shared vCPUs, 40 GB RAM, 740 GB NVMe SSD, and a fractional NVIDIA A40 GPU.
tagline: A cost-effective fractional GPU instance combining NVIDIA Ampere acceleration with high-speed NVMe storage for mid-range parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 16 GB of dedicated VRAM
8 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs and 40.0 GB of system memory
740 GB local NVMe SSD storage for high-speed data access
Cost-effective resource profile for smaller GPU-accelerated tasks
Well-suited for machine learning inference, data science, and transcoding
